code: const db = await new Promise((res, rej) => { const r = indexedDB.open('User_5b08508e0e63483a92b401d30681baea_v6'); r.onsuccess = () => res(r.result); r.onerror = () => rej(r.error); }); const tx = db.transaction(['extensionsObjectStorage'], 'readonly'); const store = tx.objectStore('extensionsObjectStorage'); const val = await new Promise((res, rej) => { const r = store.get('c78c9305280f48c0ad48d53803e7f1b2|iframe/bundle.js'); r.onsuccess = () => res(r.result); r.onerror = () => rej(r.error); }); db.close(); const file = val.source; const text = await file.text(); const out = { idbFileSize: file.size, idbTextLen: text.length, idbIsMinified: !text.includes('// iframe/src/'), idbHasWindowDrag: text.includes('addEventListener("dragover"') }; const f = document.querySelector('iframe'); if (f) { const win = f.contentWindow; const doc = f.contentDocument; const scriptEl = doc.scripts[0]; const r2 = await win.fetch(scriptEl.src); const t2 = await r2.text(); out.iframeScriptLen = t2.length; out.iframeScriptFirst100 = t2.substring(0, 100); const dz = doc.getElementById('drop-zone-left'); const ev = new win.DragEvent('dragover', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true }); dz.dispatchEvent(ev); out.dragoverPrevented = ev.defaultPrevented; out.dzHasDragOverClass = dz.classList.contains('drag-over'); } else { out.iframe = 'not open'; } return out;
